message:
feat(recorder_migration): Cx-first m3_checkpoint_sync (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to ticks 67 and 68. Third of 4 MigrationEngine async
entry points.

Addition (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `MigrationEngine::m3_checkpoint_sync_with_cx(cx, source,
    target, manifest)` — Cx-first parallel of
    `m3_checkpoint_sync`. Checkpoints at 2 seams:
      - pre-flight: pre-cancelled cx returns before
        `source.lag_metrics()` touches storage.
      - per-consumer inside the migration loop: cx.checkpoint()?
        at the top of each iteration, embedding running
        `checkpoints_migrated` and `checkpoints_reset` counters
        in the cancellation error so operators can see how far
        the sync got.

Cancellation-safety contract: the per-iteration checkpoint fires
BEFORE the `source.read_checkpoint` call for that consumer, so a
mid-sync cancel leaves the target with a CONSISTENT set of
fully-migrated consumers up to the abort point. Already-migrated
consumers are NOT rolled back — the
`CheckpointCommitOutcome::Advanced` /
`CheckpointCommitOutcome::NoopAlreadyAdvanced` idempotency means
a subsequent resume replays safely (already-migrated consumers
return NoopAlreadyAdvanced, still incrementing
`checkpoints_migrated`).

Regression tests (2 new):

  * `m3_checkpoint_sync_with_cx_matches_legacy` — two-consumer
    topology (indexer at ordinal 3, auditor at ordinal 2, both
    in manifest range [0, 10]). Asserts consumers_found,
    checkpoints_migrated, checkpoints_reset, reset_consumers
    all match the legacy path. Target must have received 2
    commits.

  * `m3_checkpoint_sync_with_cx_resets_out_of_range` — single
    consumer at ordinal 100 with manifest range [5, 20]. Must
    trigger the reset branch (in_range = false) on the Cx path,
    producing `checkpoints_reset=1`,
    `reset_consumers=["idx"]`, and `checkpoints_migrated=1`
    (the reset checkpoint was still committed). Guards
    against a regression where the ordinal-range check might
    be skipped on the Cx path.

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * recorder_migration:: — 54 passed / 0 failed (tick 68: 52 ->
    tick 69: 54, +2 new parity tests; all 8 legacy m3 tests
    still green)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (54.65s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Cx-first recorder_migration.rs progress after tick 69:
  * `m0_preflight`       ✓ (tick 67)
  * `m2_import`          ✓ (tick 68)
  * `m3_checkpoint_sync` ✓ (tick 69, this commit)
  * `m5_cutover`         — pending
  * `run_m0_m2`          — pending (composite: delegates to m0
                         + m1 + m2, so wiring this through is
                         mostly mechanical once m5 is done)

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
